name: Delta-Mem MLX
description: Apple Silicon helper plugin for connecting OpenClaw to a local delta-mem MLX sidecar.

sidecarBaseUrl.description: Base URL for the running delta-mem sidecar, without the /v1 suffix.

modelId.description: Model id exposed by the sidecar.

sidecarRoot.description: Optional existing checkout/install path for the delta-mem sidecar.

managedInstallRoot.description: Optional directory where the helper installer cloned the sidecar.

installMode.description: external means the user manages the sidecar; managed means this plugin's helper scripts manage it.

allowManagedDownloads.description: When true, setup helpers may download public Hugging Face model artifacts after explicit user confirmation.
